description_long: This object is a compact, black shotgun with a cylindrical main body and a short, thick barrel extending from the front. The design features a vertical pistol-style grip beneath the main body, and a separate, boxy magazine and a single visible shell are positioned adjacent to the main assembly. The shotgun lacks a traditional stock, giving it a minimalistic and tactical appearance. The trigger and a rounded trigger guard are clearly visible beneath the main body. The overall finish is matte black, with no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel, and the magazine appears detachable.
description: A compact, matte black shotgun with a cylindrical body, pistol grip, and detachable box magazine, lacking a traditional stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical barrel, pistol grip, trigger guard, and separated box magazine with a single shell.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, the width of the magazine, and the alignment of the grip beneath the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the magazine and shell now on the left, and the trigger and grip visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the cylindrical body, the magazine's thickness, and the grip's alignment.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
